title: Site Manager/ Project Lead (Residential & Renovation) #80798
description:
Job Description

  • Industry/ Organization Type: Construction of Buildings
  • Position Title: Site Manager/ Project Lead (Residential & Renovation)
  • Working Location: Ubi
  • Working Hours: 5 days (Monday-Friday, 9AM-6PM)
  • Salary Package: Basic Salary
  • Duration: Permanent

Key Responsibilities

  • Plan, manage, and execute landed house, condominium, and HDB renovation projects, ensuring completion within schedule, budget, and quality standards.
  • Lead and supervise site teams and subcontractors, allocating manpower and resources to meet project milestones.
  • Review architectural, structural, and M&E drawings, specifications, and design details, highlight discrepancies and propose practical solutions.
  • Coordinate and attend site and technical meetings with clients, consultants, main contractors, and authorities.
  • Manage site works, including structural alterations, architectural finishes, and interior (fit-out) to comply with approved drawings and regulations.
  • Monitor daily site progress, conduct regular inspections, and enforce safety, quality, and housekeeping standards.
  • Prepare and update project programs, work schedules, and progress reports for management and clients.
  • Handle contract administration, including variation orders, progress claims, back-charges, and final accounts.
  • Liaise with suppliers and subcontractors on procurement, delivery, and installation to avoid delays.
  • Resolve site issues promptly and provide technical guidance to the project team.
  • Perform other ad hoc project-related duties as assigned.

APPLY NOW!!!

  • Diploma or equivalent in Building, Civil Engineering, Construction Management, Architecture, or similar.
  • Minimum 3–5 years of relevant experience.
  • Having landed house construction or condo/HDB renovation experience would be an advantage.
  • Good knowledge of local regulations, authority requirements, and construction methods for residential projects.
  • Strong leadership, coordination, and problem-solving skills, able to manage multiple projects independently.

Kindly apply through ANY of the following methods:

  • Submit your application by clicking the APPLY button;
  • Email your resume to Job@anradus.com.sg. Please indicate #80798 on the email subject.

Anradus Application Policy: We value each application and ensure every resume is reviewed. Our process is efficient, typically concluding within 3 working days. If you do not receive communication from us within this timeframe, it's likely that your application has not been shortlisted by our client. In such cases, we recommend continuing your job search to maximize your opportunities.
